name: AgEagle Aerial Systems Inc.
summary: AgEagle Aerial Systems Inc. (rebranded as EagleNXT in 2025) designs and delivers drones, sensors, and software for military/defense, public safety, surveying/mapping, agriculture, and utilities/engineering industries. Key products include the eBee line of fixed-wing UAVs, MicaSense multispectral and thermal cameras, and the Measure Ground Control SaaS platform. The company distributes through over 165 global resellers and has achieved BVLOS and Blue UAS certifications.
